name: jerome7
description: 7 minutes a day. An act of love. AI-powered fitness accountability with daily session generation, streak tracking, pod matching, and smart nudges. Works autonomously inside any MCP-compatible agent.

tools.name: jerome7_daily
tools.description: Get today's AI-generated 7-minute session for a user. Personalized based on fitness level and feedback history.

tools.name: jerome7_pledge
tools.description: Register a new user. Collects name, timezone, fitness level, age bracket, gender, and goal.

tools.name: jerome7_log
tools.description: Log a completed session. Updates streak, triggers milestone messages.

tools.name: jerome7_streak
tools.description: Get streak data: current streak, longest streak, 30-day chain visualization.

tools.name: jerome7_nudge
tools.description: Check if a user needs an accountability nudge. Returns risk status and hours remaining.

tools.name: jerome7_pod_match
tools.description: Find or create an accountability pod of 3-5 builders at the same level and timezone.
